Index.title: Edu Stack IS
Index.description: Information system for supporting informatics education.

hero.title: Edu Stack IS
hero.subtitle: Discover the brain of the school through simulation.
hero.description: Edu Stack IS is an educational tool designed to help students understand the complexity of school management, data flows, and security in the digital age.

idea.title: The Idea
idea.description: Shifting the perception of information systems from passive tools to active educational instruments.
idea.point2: Simulate real school processes (registry, grading, schedule).
idea.point3: Analyze systemic impacts of administrative decisions.

tech.title: Technical Description
tech.description: Modern, scalable, and globally distributed infrastructure.
tech.stack: Built with NestJS, React, Cloudflare D1, and MCP for AI integration.
tech.architecture: Modular monorepo architecture with serverless edge computing.

rules.title: Rules & Licensing
rules.description: Edu Stack IS is an open-source project.
rules.clause1: Available on GitHub for review and non-commercial educational use.
rules.clause2: Commercial usage requires a specific agreement.

Worksheets.title: Working Sheets
Worksheets.description: Detailed scenarios and methodological guides extracted from the bachelor thesis.

primary.title: Primary School (4th-5th Grade)
primary.lesson1: Explorer and the Mystery of Roles
primary.lesson2: A Day in the Teacher's Role
primary.lesson3: The Director and the Whole School

Manual.title: User Manual
Manual.intro: Complete guide to setting up and operating the Edu Stack Information System.

development.title: Local Development
development.description: How to set up the development environment on your local machine.
development.step2: Install dependencies using `npm install` in the root directory.
development.step3: Configure environment variables in `.env` files for both frontend and backend.
development.step4: Start the development server with `npm run dev`.

setup.title: System Setup
setup.description: Initializing the system for the first time.

option1.title: Seed Data (Recommended)
option1.description: Quickly populate the system with demo schools, users, and schedules using the `npm run db:seed` command.

option2.title: From Scratch
option2.description: Start with an empty database and create your first System Administrator through the CLI.

helper.title: Login Helper
helper.description: A developer tool on the login screen to quickly switch between demo identities without passwords.

credentials.title: Email & Password
credentials.description: Standard secure authentication using hashed passwords in the D1 database.

sso.title: SSO Integration
sso.description: Enterprise-grade login support for Google, GitHub, and Microsoft accounts.

systemAdmin.title: System Administrator
systemAdmin.description: Global orchestrator of the entire platform. Handles infrastructure and multi-tenant management.
systemAdmin.functions: School lifecycle management (create/suspend/delete), Global System Admin management, SSO provider configuration (Google, GitHub, MS), AI API key management (Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic), Global AI usage monitoring and token analytics.

workflow1.title: School Management
workflow1.description: Create new school tenants, define unique identifiers, and manage their active/suspended status from a global dashboard.

workflow2.title: Identity Providers
workflow2.description: Configure OAuth2/OpenID Connect settings for Google, GitHub, and Microsoft to enable school-wide SSO.

workflow3.title: AI Resource Orchestration
workflow3.description: Manage API keys for different LLM providers and monitor token consumption per school and per user.

schoolAdmin.title: School Administrator
schoolAdmin.description: Technical manager of a specific school instance. Operates within the school (TENANT) context.
schoolAdmin.functions: School registry management, User invitation and role assignments, CSV user import/export, Audit log monitoring, School-wide settings and module configuration, User impersonation for support.

workflow1.title: Bulk User Onboarding
workflow1.description: Import entire classes or staff lists using the CSV upload tool. Automate invitation email generation.

workflow2.title: Administrative Support (Impersonation)
workflow2.description: Securely log into user accounts to verify permissions, fix configuration issues, or provide direct technical support.

workflow3.title: System Audit
workflow3.description: Review detailed logs of all critical actions (deletions, setting changes) to ensure security and compliance.

headmaster.title: Headmaster
headmaster.description: Pedagogical and organizational leader of the school. Focuses on overview and school-wide communication.
headmaster.functions: Access to high-level school dashboard and statistics, School-wide event planning, Public community announcements and broadcasts, Monitoring of educational quality and teacher performance.

workflow1.title: Strategic Oversight
workflow1.description: Monitor real-time statistics on grade averages, attendance trends, and school-wide KPI via the Headmaster Dashboard.

workflow2.title: School Communications
workflow2.description: Post official announcements, broadcast messages to all users, and manage the community bulletin board.

workflow3.title: Academic Calendar
workflow3.description: Oversee and approve the yearly plan, including holidays, school-wide events, and parent-teacher meeting schedules.

deputy.title: Deputy Principal
deputy.description: Operational manager focusing on the technical organization of the educational process.
deputy.functions: Academic year and semester setup, Classroom and building management, Subject and curriculum (SVP) design, Complex schedule planning and collision detection, Substitution management, Class registry oversight.

workflow1.title: Structural Architecture
workflow1.description: Define the physical and logical structure of the school: buildings, specialized rooms, and classroom groups.

workflow2.title: Interactive Schedule Planning
workflow2.description: Use the drag-and-drop schedule planner with built-in collision detection for teachers, rooms, and students.

workflow3.title: Substitution Management
workflow3.description: Handle daily absences by assigning substitute teachers and rooms, ensuring educational continuity.

teacher.title: Teacher
teacher.description: The educational core of the system. Direct interaction with students and educational data.
teacher.functions: Grade book management (marks, categories, weights), Attendance tracking and excuse management, Class book entries and signing, Thematic plans and lesson preparations, AI Teaching Assistant (lesson generation, report card polishing).

workflow1.title: Grade Book Mastery
workflow1.description: Enter grades into weighted categories, manage verbal evaluations, and generate end-of-term reports.

workflow2.title: Digital Class Book
workflow2.description: Digitally sign lesson entries, record the topic of instruction, and track attendance in real-time during class.

workflow3.title: AI Pedagogical Assistant
workflow3.description: Use AI to generate lesson plans, polish verbal evaluations on report cards, and create educational materials.

student.title: Student
student.description: The primary user of educational services. Focuses on personal progress and daily organization.
student.functions: Personal dashboard with grade overview, Interactive daily and weekly schedule, Community messaging and polls, Access to teaching materials, AI Study Partner for educational support.

workflow1.title: Personal Progress Tracking
workflow1.description: View a real-time overview of your grades, weighted averages, and teacher feedback for all subjects.

workflow2.title: Interactive Schedule
workflow2.description: Access your daily timetable, see substitution changes instantly, and view upcoming school events.

workflow3.title: AI Study Partner
workflow3.description: Interact with the built-in AI assistant to get help with difficult concepts, generate summaries, or ask subject-specific questions.

Footer.description: Modern information system designed to transform informatics education through interactive simulation.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At Edu Stack IS, we take your privacy seriously. This presentation website is purely informational.

section1.title: Data Collection
section1.content: We do not collect any personal data from visitors of this presentation website. No cookies are used for tracking or profiling.

section2.title: Information System Data
section2.content: The Edu Stack IS application itself handles data according to the configurations set by the hosting educational institution. For the sandbox version, data is handled according to our non-commercial open-source rules.

section3.title: Third-Party Services
section3.content: This site is hosted on Cloudflare Pages. Cloudflare may collect standard web server logs for security and performance purposes.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: By accessing this website, you agree to the following terms.

section1.title: Usage of Content
section1.content: The content on this website is for educational and presentation purposes. You may use the information here to understand the Edu Stack IS project.

section2.title: Software License
section2.content: The Edu Stack IS software is open-source. Usage is restricted to non-commercial educational purposes. Any commercial usage requires a written agreement with the author.

section3.title: Disclaimer
section3.content: The information provided here is 'as is' without any warranties. We are not responsible for any issues arising from the use of the information or software presented here.
